definition: the physical or mental power or skill needed to do something
examples: She has the ability to solve complex problems.

definition: to succeed in finishing something or reaching an aim
examples: He achieved his goal of running a marathon.

definition: existing in fact, not imagined
examples: The actual cost was higher than expected.

definition: a condition giving a greater chance of success
examples: Speaking English is a big advantage in business.

definition: to give a suggestion about the best thing to do
examples: I advise you to save money for emergencies.

definition: to produce a change in something
examples: The rain will affect our travel plans.

definition: to have enough money to buy something
examples: We can't afford to buy a new car right now.

definition: a decision or arrangement that people make
examples: We reached an agreement on the price.

definition: to give permission for something to happen
examples: Smoking is not allowed here.

definition: a quantity of something
examples: A large amount of data was lost.

definition: to study or examine something in detail
examples: We need to analyze the results carefully.

definition: to tell people something officially
examples: They will announce the winner tomorrow.

definition: worried or nervous
examples: She felt anxious about the interview.

definition: as far as you know or can see
examples: Apparently, the meeting was cancelled.

definition: to come near; a way of dealing with something
examples: We need a new approach to this problem.

definition: suitable for a particular situation
examples: Jeans are not appropriate for the dinner.

definition: to plan or organize something
examples: I will arrange a meeting for next week.

definition: to accept something as true without proof
examples: I assume you have read the email.

definition: to join or fasten something
examples: Please attach your resume to the email.

definition: able to be used or bought
examples: Is this seat available?

definition: to keep away from something
examples: Try to avoid making the same mistake.

definition: a situation where different things exist in equal amounts
examples: It's important to maintain a work-life balance.

definition: the way someone acts
examples: His behavior in class was excellent.

definition: an advantage or profit gained from something
examples: Exercise has many health benefits.

definition: to say someone is responsible for something bad
examples: Don't blame me for the delay.

definition: to take and use something belonging to someone else
examples: Can I borrow your pen?

definition: to discuss a problem to produce ideas
examples: Let's brainstorm some new marketing ideas.

definition: short in time or duration
examples: Let's have a brief meeting.

definition: a plan of how to spend money
examples: We need to stay within our budget.

definition: to judge the amount or number of something
examples: I need to calculate the total cost.

definition: to decide that an organized event will not happen
examples: They had to cancel the flight.

definition: the job or series of jobs that you do during your life
examples: She has a successful career in law.

definition: money in the form of coins or notes
examples: Do you have any cash on you?

definition: to make something happen; a reason
examples: The storm caused a lot of damage.

definition: to do something enjoyable because of a special event
examples: We will celebrate his birthday tonight.

definition: the qualities that make a person distinct
examples: She has a strong character.

definition: to ask for money; responsibility
examples: How much do you charge for delivery?

definition: to examine something to see if it is correct
examples: Please check your email.

definition: an act of selecting between two or more possibilities
examples: You have a choice between coffee and tea.

definition: to state that something is true; a request for money
examples: He claims he didn't break the window.

definition: a person or organization using the services of a professional
examples: We have a meeting with a new client.

definition: a piece of information that helps solve a problem
examples: I have no clue where he went.

definition: a remarkable occurrence of events at the same time
examples: What a coincidence meeting you here!

definition: to fall down suddenly; a sudden failure
examples: The old building might collapse.

definition: to bring or gather things together
examples: I need to collect the kids from school.

definition: to join two or more things together
examples: Combine the flour and sugar.

definition: physically relaxed and free from pain
examples: This chair is very comfortable.

definition: an order; to give an order
examples: The officer gave a command.

definition: to do something wrong; to promise to do something
examples: Don't commit to more than you can handle.

definition: to share or exchange information
examples: We communicate via email.

definition: to say that you are not satisfied with something
examples: He always complains about the weather.

definition: to finish; having all necessary parts
examples: Please complete the form.

definition: consisting of many different and connected parts
examples: This is a very complex problem.

definition: to give all your attention to something
examples: I can't concentrate with all this noise.

definition: an abstract idea or general notion
examples: It's a difficult concept to understand.

definition: worry; to relate to
examples: Safety is our main concern.

definition: the end or finish of an event or process
examples: We came to the conclusion that it was too expensive.

definition: feeling or showing confidence in oneself
examples: She felt confident about the exam.

definition: to establish the truth or correctness of something
examples: Please confirm your reservation.

definition: a serious disagreement or argument
examples: There is a conflict between the two departments.

definition: to make someone unable to think clearly
examples: Don't confuse me with the details.

definition: to join together
examples: Click here to connect to the internet.

definition: to think carefully about something
examples: I will consider your offer.

definition: acting or done in the same way over time
examples: You need to be consistent with your exercise.

definition: communication; to get in touch
examples: Keep in contact with me.

definition: to have something inside
examples: This bottle contains water.

definition: the things that are written or printed inside
examples: I like the content of this course.

definition: the circumstances that form the setting for an event
examples: You need to understand the context.

definition: to persist in an activity or process
examples: Please continue reading.

definition: a written or spoken agreement
examples: Sign the contract before starting.

definition: to give something to help achieve something
examples: Everyone should contribute to the discussion.

definition: power to influence or direct people's behavior
examples: You need to control your emotions.

definition: to cause someone to believe that something is true
examples: I couldn't convince him to stay.

definition: to make a similar version of something
examples: Don't copy my homework.

definition: free from error; to make right
examples: Your answer is correct.

definition: the amount needed to buy or do something
examples: How much does it cost?

definition: to determine the total number of something
examples: Count your change.

definition: to bring something into existence
examples: She wants to create a new design.

definition: ability of a customer to obtain goods before payment
examples: Can I pay by credit card?

definition: expressing disapproval; of great importance
examples: This is a critical moment for the project.

definition: a large number of people gathered together
examples: The crowd cheered loudly.

definition: the ideas and customs of a particular people
examples: I love learning about different cultures.

definition: belonging to the present time
examples: What is your current address?

definition: a person who buys goods or services
examples: The customer is always right.

definition: physical harm that impairs the value of something
examples: The storm caused a lot of damage.

definition: to do business; an agreement
examples: Let's make a deal.

definition: a formal discussion on a particular topic
examples: There was a debate about the new law.

definition: something, typically money, that is owed
examples: He is trying to pay off his debt.

definition: a period of ten years
examples: Technology has changed a lot in the last decade.

definition: to come to a resolution in the mind
examples: I can't decide what to wear.

definition: a choice or judgment
examples: It was a difficult decision.

definition: to say something in a solemn and emphatic manner
examples: He declared his innocence.

definition: to make or become smaller or fewer
examples: Prices started to decrease.

definition: without doubt; certainly
examples: I will definitely be there.

definition: to bring and hand over to the proper recipient
examples: They will deliver the package tomorrow.

definition: an insistent request; to ask for
examples: There is a high demand for this product.

definition: a division of a large organization
examples: She works in the sales department.

definition: to be controlled or determined by
examples: It depends on the weather.

definition: to give an account in words
examples: Can you describe what happened?

definition: a plan or drawing produced to show the look of a thing
examples: She designed a beautiful logo.
